title: Evidence Docket 6.1 — Proof Run 001 v75 Scaffold
objective: Prepare GoalOS Proof Run 001 by publishing a claim-bounded capability continuum, release bundle vault, proof-debt-to-AGI-Jobs router, ProofBundle return gate, Evidence Docket 6.1 room, RSI/Move-37 gate, and external replay room.

claims_matrix.claim: GoalOS v75 adds public Proof Run 001 scaffolding.

claims_matrix.evidence: release bundle hashes and download vault

claims_matrix.claim: GoalOS has achieved AGI/ASI or empirical SOTA.
claims_matrix.evidence: not claimed; requires independent evidence beyond this scaffold

claims_matrix.claim: $AGIALPHA settlement is live in local mode.
claims_matrix.evidence: local mode is intent/spec only, no wallet/no transaction/no user funds

proof_debt_register.claim: GoalOS can preserve product lineage from V34 through V38.
proof_debt_register.missing_evidence: bundle hashes, public vault, release manifest

proof_debt_register.claim: GoalOS generates materially different jobs for unrelated objectives.
Proof Run 001 can accept returned ProofBundles.
External replay can inspect the run.

public_private_boundary: Public pages expose proof scaffolds, hashes, and public-safe manifests. Private prompts, private traces, secrets, customer data, and privileged workpapers do not belong in the public site.
capability_gate: HOLD until replay_result and validator_verdict evidence exists.
